scope: 9Router prompt/workflow validation for clean Shinokute albedo turnaround, material-ID masks, and no-bleed candidate output before Godot integration

uses_9router_reference_images.evidence: prompts/2026-07-08-shinokute-albedo-mask-prompt-lab.md records primary identity and anatomy references plus model/key rules

uses_only_workspace_image_model.evidence: prompt lab model rule is cx/gpt-5.5-image

clean_albedo_turnaround_exists.evidence: shinokute_albedo_turnaround_attempt2_qc.json has bad=[] and albedo_turnaround_pool_attempt2 contains 8 extracted views

clean_material_id_turnaround_exists.evidence: shinokute_material_id_turnaround_attempt1_qc.json has bad=[] and material_id_turnaround_pool_attempt1 contains 8 extracted views

photoroom_full_sheet_before_extraction.evidence: prompt lab records full generated sheets were passed through Photoroom before high-alpha component polygon extraction

no_grid_slicing.evidence: prompt lab extraction method records high-alpha connected component polygon masks and no automatic grid slicing

naive_projection_rejected.evidence: prompt lab records albedo projection and material-ID projection candidates rejected because projection still smeared material zones

no_skin_hood_leg_bleed.evidence: shinokute_prompt_lab_material_zone_v10_candidate_qc.json marks skin_not_spilling_onto_hoodie_chest, hoodie_chest_not_skin_patched, exposed_legs_not_black_smeared, socks_remain_black, and shoes_remain_red_black_white_from_projection true

not_integrated_to_godot.evidence: v10 QC has integrated_to_character_scene=false and scene references do not point to the v10 candidate

tradeoffs_recorded.evidence: v10 QC records reduced face detail and reduced hoodie logo/detail as tradeoffs

not_production_integration: Do not integrate v10 into objects/character.tscn without owner approval.
Production-quality identity restoration remains optional future work: controlled face/detail or hoodie-logo decal pass, or Hunyuan Paint/native renderer when available.
